PowerShell($base = "https://sjuturwwkeysxdpsnunr.supabase.co/rest/v1"; $key = "sb_publishable_EMUXwAjmDaJAPG-g6L1obg_g8nnZPbd"; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; foreach \($t in @\("geckos","inquiries"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$t`?select=id&limit=1" -Headers $h -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "$t : OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\) → $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $body = ""; try { $body = \(New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\)\).ReadToEnd\(\) } catch {}; "$t : 실패 \($code\) → $body" } })
